description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test libBLS that runs on push events to all branches except develop, master, beta, and stable. The workflow should have three jobs: linux_build_and_test, osx_build_and_test, and linux_build_with_emscripten. Each job should extract the repository name, check out the code, install required packages, build dependencies, configure, build, and run tests. The linux_build_and_test and osx_build_and_test jobs should also upload coverage reports to CodeCov.
